hero.subtitle: From your first dataset to deploying explainable predictions — learn the entire platform across five hands-on modules, with real SAQL and copy-paste examples.

cta.title: Ready to become a CRM Analytics pro?
cta.subtitle: Begin the curriculum today — it is free, open, and built to take you all the way to certified.

home.curriculumSubtitle: Start at the top and work down — together they cover the whole pipeline, from raw data to a deployed prediction.

foundations.title: Foundations
foundations.desc: What CRM Analytics is, how data becomes a secure dataset, and the building blocks of the platform.

analytics.title: Analytics & SAQL
analytics.desc: Write SAQL queries, build interactive dashboards, and add predictions with Einstein Discovery.

home.newHereDesc: Begin with Foundations and follow the modules in order for a complete, guided learning path.
home.howTitle: Learn it, try it, build it

read.title: Read the lesson
read.desc: Short, focused lessons explain one idea at a time with real examples.

try.title: Try it live
try.desc: Every concept maps to a concrete action — follow along in a free Developer org.

build.title: Build a project
build.desc: Lessons accumulate into a working pipeline: data, datasets, dashboards, a model.

ai.title: Ask the AI
ai.desc: Every page is available as Markdown and over MCP, so an assistant can tutor you.

home.resourcesTitle: The best links, curated for you
home.resourcesDesc: Beyond the curriculum, we maintain a filterable library of official docs, Trailhead, SAQL references, communities, and tools.

seo.homeTitle: CRM Analytics Academy — Learn Salesforce CRM Analytics
seo.homeDesc: A free, open-source curriculum for mastering Salesforce CRM Analytics — from data prep and SAQL to dashboards and Einstein Discovery, in five hands-on modules.
seo.aboutDesc: The story behind CRM Analytics Academy — an open-source curriculum for Salesforce CRM Analytics — and the person who builds it.
seo.resourcesDesc: A curated list of the best Salesforce CRM Analytics resources — official docs, Trailhead, SAQL references, community, and tools.
